companyNameJapanese: 株式会社フジミインコーポレーテッド
description: Manufactures and sells synthetic precision abrasives including CMP slurry for semiconductor device production, polishing materials for silicon wafers, and abrasives for hard disk drives.

_externalRelationships.notes: 18% market share in CMP slurry (2024). 50%+ share in polysilicon CMP for FEOL. Slurries widely adopted for 5nm/3nm processes by Taiwanese foundries.

_metadata.notes: FY2025 revenue growth: 21.5% from advanced logic semiconductor materials. Q1 FY2026 polishing slurry sales +18.9%. Founded 1950, HQ: Kiyosu, Japan. 90%+ share in wafer polishing materials.
